$comment: Hand-edited control-plane config. Drives scripts/generate-status.mjs. Edit this file (and the per-package ROADMAP/CHANGELOG) to update what STATUS.md shows.

packages.name: @nekostack/cli
packages.note: **Lineage:** placeholder through v0.1–v0.6, then shipped jointly with `@nekostack/schema` as the `neko schema *` phase — tagged `schema-v0.7.0` ([PR #25](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/pull/25), 2026-05-19), not under its own prefix. Its standalone npm line begins at v1.0.0.

packages.name: @nekostack/theme
packages.note: **Built to maturity before public release** — shipped directly at v1.0 with no pre-release versions. The token pipeline and theme system were developed against internal consumers, then published as a stable surface.

packages.name: @nekostack/ui
packages.note: **Built to maturity before public release** — shipped directly at v1.0 with no pre-release versions. The 92-component vanilla-CSS library was developed against `@nekostack/theme` tokens, then published as a stable surface.

next_actions: Five packages published at v1.0+: schema, cli, migrate-runner, theme, ui. Metapackage at v1.1.1.
@nekostack/lint v0.1 shipped (2026-06-20, PR #79): plugin, base config, no-direct-process-env rule, 11 tests.
@nekostack/lint v0.2 shipped (2026-06-20, PR #80): schema-no-inline-zod, prisma-json-cast, service-has-spec, controller-no-service-cycle, strict config. 49 total tests.
@nekostack/lint v0.3 shipped (2026-06-19, PR #81): react-no-inline-style, nest-no-orm-in-controller, ./react config, ./nest config. 69 total tests.
@nekostack/test v0.1 shipped (2026-06-19, PR #82): createRuleTester, createJsxRuleTester. 5 tests.
@nekostack/lint v0.4 shipped (2026-06-19, PR #83): no-hardcoded-secrets, no-raw-sql, schema-export-type (auto-fix), react-no-dangerously-set-html. 105 total tests.
@nekostack/lint v0.5 shipped (2026-06-20, PR #86): consistent-type-imports (auto-fix), no-console-in-module, nest-event-handler-has-spec, no-direct-date-now. 142 total tests.
@nekostack/lint v0.6 shipped (2026-06-20, PR #88): no-type-assertion-to-any, no-non-null-assertion, react-hook-naming, nest-controller-response-type, recommended config. 188 total tests.
@nekostack/lint v1.0 shipped (2026-06-20, PR #89): 19 rule docs, CONFIGS.md, MIGRATION_GUIDE.md, @nekostack/schema linted with recommended on CI. 188 total tests. Package flipped public.
NEXT: @nekostack/config v0.1 (in progress, PR #TBD): defineConfig(), c.* field builders, Secret<T>, boot validation, dotenv precedence. 59 tests.
THEN: @nekostack/config v0.2 — neko config check CLI verb, ESLint rule tightening.
THEN: @nekostack/config v0.3 — configToJsonSchema() + configToMarkdown() for agent-facing config introspection.
THEN: @nekostack/governance (Phase 2) — encode PRODUCT_THESIS four-question gate as CI policy, not a markdown doc.
